name: All-Bran Extra Fiber Muffins (Ovo Lacto)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, stir together the flour, sugar, and baking powder.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the cereal and milk. Let stand for 5 minutes or until the cereal softens.
3. Add the Egg beaters (99% real egg product) and mix well.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture, stirring only until combined.
5. Pour the batter into 12 muffin cups.
6. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes or until lightly browned.
7. Serve warm.
